content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "The Values You Can Make". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/687/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of coins. The second line contains n space-separated integers, the values of the coins. The third line contains an integer, the target sum.
content.outputFormat: The number of ways to make the target sum using the given coins.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to build up a table of the number of ways to make each sum from 0 to the target sum.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
coins = list(map(int, input().split()))
sum_ = int(input())
dp = [0] * (sum_ + 1)
dp[0] = 1
for coin in coins:
    for j in range(coin, sum_ + 1):
        dp[j] += dp[j - coin]
print(dp[sum_])
